settings.heading: Clear Skin Starts Here
settings.subheading: Professional-grade blackhead removal at home. ClearVac™ micro-pulse technology gently extracts impurities without bruising. Safer than squeezing, cleaner than facials.

settings.label: Dermatologist Approved
settings.description: Safe & effective for all skin types

settings.heading: Your 60-Second Pore Reset
settings.description: Warm skin, then glide PoreLift™. Our ClearVac™ micro-pulse suction lifts oil and debris to reduce the look of blackheads and texture—so skin appears smoother and makeup sits better.

settings.heading: Daily-Routine Easy.
settings.description: Rechargeable, rinse-clean tips—warm, glide, rinse, done. Take control of your pores in just 60 seconds a day.

settings.heading: Comfort-First Suction
settings.description: ClearVac™ micro-pulse is designed to be gentle—start on Level 1, glide, don't hover. No bruising, just clearer-looking pores.

settings.heading: 3 Interchangeable Tips
settings.description: Small circle for nose & T-zone, large circle for cheeks, oval tip for sensitive areas. Every zone covered.

settings.quote: I used the silicone tip on the lowest level and kept it moving—no irritation, just smoother-feeling skin.

settings.callout_text: ClearVac™ micro-pulse technology is designed to minimize bruising and irritation. Start on Level 1 and work your way up—your skin will thank you.
Skip the $150 facial appointments and awkward small talk. Get professional pore care at home in just 60 seconds a day. Your schedule, your bathroom, your results.
One device replaces monthly facials. Save hundreds compared to spa extractions. Rechargeable, reusable, and designed to last. Clear skin shouldn't cost a fortune.

settings.subtitle: A New Standard in Skincare.
settings.text: We're building a future where skincare is effective, accessible, and safe. Our pore care tools skip the harsh extractions, cost less than spa treatments, and save you time—because clear skin shouldn't come at the expense of your skin's health.

settings.question: Will it really not bruise my face?
settings.answer: ClearVac™ micro-pulse is designed to be gentler than traditional suction. Start on Level 1, keep moving in short glides, and your skin should feel smooth—not sore. Most users see results without any marks.

settings.question: How long does it take to see results?
settings.answer: Most users notice smoother texture and fewer visible blackheads after 1-2 uses. For best results, use 2-3x per week. Consistency is key!

settings.question: Is it safe for all skin types and ages?
settings.answer: Yes! PoreLift™ is designed for all skin types. Start on the lowest level if you have sensitive skin. Not recommended for active acne or inflamed areas.

settings.question: How do I use PoreLift properly?
settings.answer: Warm your skin with a hot towel first, apply light gliding motions (don't hover!), and rinse the tip after each use. Start on Level 1 and work your way up as your skin adapts.
